one_line_positioning: Aspiring AI Product Engineer with IIT Delhi CS and React frontend skills, eager to build customer-facing AI tools for Nicobar's design-led e-commerce
narrative_angle: Nicobar needs an AI-native builder who can craft polished customer experiences — this candidate stands out by pairing a top-tier IIT Delhi engineering education with hands-on frontend development and machine learning experimentation. While lacking production LLM experience, their rapid learning and foundation in NLP suggest they can quickly scale to Nicobar's personalization and conversational AI goals.
lead_strengths: B.Tech Computer Science from IIT Delhi with high GPA (9.2)
Built a sentiment analysis bot using BERT
Developed a portfolio website with React and Tailwind
proof_points_to_emphasize: B.Tech Computer Science from IIT Delhi with high GPA (9.2)
Built a sentiment analysis bot using BERT
Developed a portfolio website with React and Tailwind
Data science internship applying logistic regression to loan defaults
things_to_downplay: No professional full-time experience in AI product development
No demonstrated experience with LLM APIs (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini)
No e-commerce or retail domain knowledge
No Shopify API or systems integration experience
No evidence of CEO-level communication or business-outcome thinking
tone_guidance: Position as a fast-learning, design-aware engineer with elite academic foundations; acknowledge early career stage but emphasize raw intelligence and project initiative; use e-commerce and design vocabulary where natural, avoid overclaiming AI expertise.
recruiter_first_impression_target: A sharp, design-sensitive engineer from IIT Delhi passionate about AI and frontend, but clearly needing mentorship and upskilling to hit the mid-senior bar of the role
reasoning: The candidate has an extremely strong academic background (IIT Delhi CS, high GPA) and demonstrates relevant technical building blocks (Python, NLP with BERT, React frontend), but lacks the deep LLM API experience, e-commerce context, and professional tenure required for the role. This is a stretch application; the differentiator is rare combination of top-tier engineering and design-oriented frontend skills, but the gap in AI product engineering experience is substantial. The stance is STRETCH, with a narrative that leans on transferable skills and learning potential.
